name: clawwork-doc-task-pipeline
description: Run a ClawWork document-style task stub through OpenFang researcher -> analyst -> writer.

steps.name: scope-task
steps.prompt: Break this task into assumptions, missing inputs, and recommended sources. Task: {{input}}

steps.name: draft-artifact
steps.prompt: Create the first-pass business artifact for this task. Use the scope notes first, then the task. Scope: {{scope}}. Task: {{input}}

steps.name: polish-delivery
steps.prompt: Turn this draft into a client-ready deliverable summary with clear sections, assumptions, and next required files. Draft: {{draft}}
